attributes.title: [IIS OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Comprehensive operational visibility for IIS web servers instrumented via OpenTelemetry iisreceiver. Tracks application pool health, request handling capacity, traffic patterns, and resource utilization.

This dashboard provides operational visibility for **IIS** instrumented via the OpenTelemetry **iisreceiver** (collector-contrib):

- **Pool health** — State and uptime; any pool not Running = outage
- **Request handling** — Queue depth, age, rejections (primary saturation/error signals)
- **Traffic** — Request rate by method, connections, network throughput
- **Resources** — Active threads, bandwidth throttling
